core_mechanism: a closed-form combinatorial expansion of iterated derivatives as a recursively generated polynomial sequence, with coefficients given by set-partition counts (Stirling numbers of the second kind)
brief_reason: The abstract obtains the derivative (iterated-differentiation) polynomials of a base function in explicit form with coefficients expressed via Stirling numbers of the second kind, i.e. repeated differentiation is encoded by a combinatorial set-partition identity.
